Hi @yaba101! With route interception, any soft navigation that matches the intercepted route will trigger the interception. However, you can make use of route groups with different layouts to have finer control over which layout renders the interception modal + page, versus just rendering the page, without changing your URL structure. You can learn a bit more about route groups [here](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/routing/route-groups).
